suppress.notes: cpe:finos:gitproxy matches all git-proxy-java-* jars due to shared Maven groupId/artifactId. These CVEs are for the Node.js git-proxy (parsePush.ts) and do not apply to this Java project.
cpe:jetty:jetty false positive on git-proxy-java-server jar.

CVE-2018-14335 affects H2 through 1.4.197 only. We are on 2.x which is not vulnerable. dep-check matches on package name without respecting the fixed version ceiling. https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2018-14335
